mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user WHERE status = 1 AND role = 0) AS customer_count, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user WHERE status = 1 AND role = 1) AS admin_count, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM book WHERE status <> -1) AS total_books, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM book WHERE status = 1) AS on_shelf_books, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `order` WHERE status <> 5) AS total_orders, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `order` WHERE status = 2) AS pending_ship_orders, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM book WHERE status = 1 AND stock <= #{lowStockThreshold}) AS low_stock_books, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM banner WHERE status = 1) AS active_banners, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `order` WHERE status <> 5 AND create_time >= #{todayStart} AND create_time < #{tomorrowStart}) AS today_orders, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM `order` WHERE status IN (2, 3, 4)), 0) AS total_revenue, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM `order` WHERE status IN (2, 3, 4) AND create_time >= #{todayStart} AND create_time < #{tomorrowStart}), 0) AS today_revenue

SELECT CONCAT(LPAD(grouped.order_month, 2, '0'), '-', LPAD(grouped.order_day, 2, '0')) AS day, grouped.order_count, grouped.revenue FROM ( SELECT YEAR(create_time) AS order_year, MONTH(create_time) AS order_month, DAY(create_time) AS order_day, COUNT(1) AS order_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN (2, 3, 4) THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS revenue FROM `order` WHERE create_time >= #{startTime} GROUP BY YEAR(create_time), MONTH(create_time), DAY(create_time) ) grouped ORDER BY grouped.order_year, grouped.order_month, grouped.order_day

SELECT status, CASE status WHEN 0 THEN '待支付' WHEN 1 THEN '已支付' WHEN 2 THEN '待发货' WHEN 3 THEN '已发货' WHEN 4 THEN '已完成' WHEN 5 THEN '已取消' ELSE '未知' END AS label, COUNT(1) AS count FROM `order` GROUP BY status ORDER BY status

SELECT c.id AS category_id, c.category_name, COUNT(b.id) AS book_count FROM category c LEFT JOIN book b ON b.category_id = c.id AND b.status <> -1 WHERE c.status <> -1 GROUP BY c.id, c.category_name ORDER BY book_count DESC, c.sort_order ASC, c.id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT oi.book_id, oi.book_name, b.author, b.cover_image, SUM(oi.quantity) AS sales_count, SUM(oi.total_price) AS sales_amount FROM order_item oi INNER JOIN `order` o ON o.id = oi.order_id LEFT JOIN book b ON b.id = oi.book_id WHERE o.status IN (2, 3, 4) GROUP BY oi.book_id, oi.book_name, b.author, b.cover_image ORDER BY sales_count DESC, sales_amount DESC, oi.book_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, book_name, author, stock, status FROM book WHERE status = 1 AND stock <= #{lowStockThreshold} ORDER BY stock ASC, update_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, u.username, o.total_amount, o.status, DATE_FORMAT(o.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS create_time FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = o.user_id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
